content.full_text:
Roy W. Lockwood
327 to -C. Lt
Oxnard, CA 93030

Legal Dept PPPC
428 "N" Ft St
[illegible] 0706 Valley 2, 1940
Veramito, CA 95814.

Undersigned contemplates entering
the Oxnard City Council Campaign
for City Council & also Oxnard Unified
High School Bd of Trustees.
Undersigned plans to finance
the Campaign from Personal
Fund - No Contribute to be
received.

Lastline an PPPC that
will limit my personal efforts
to the Committee to [illegible] Lockwood?
Or Mishandersue rules in
of this matter is required?

Thank you

[signature] Roy Lockwood

[illegible] [illegible]

sections.question: Is there an PPPC that will limit my personal funds to the Committee to Elect Lockwood? An authoritative ruling on this matter is requested?
sections.question_synthetic: The requester asks whether FPPC regulations limit the amount of personal funds a candidate can contribute to their own campaign committee for simultaneous city council and school board races.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No conclusion or advice section present. The document references a faint handwritten image overlay, but the primary legible text is the typed letter. Minor spelling variation in correspondence address (PPPC instead of FPPC appears in original).

embedding.summary: Ray W. Lockwood requests an authoritative FPPC ruling on whether regulations limit personal fund contributions to his campaign committee for concurrent Oxnard City Council and Union High School Board campaigns, with no outside contributions planned.
